info.title: WolvenKit.CLI
info.description: Command line modding tool for Cyberpunk 2077.

hookCapture.patchTarget: ProcessExit-fallback (OK: ArgumentExtensions.Parse, OK: ArgumentExtensions.Parse, OK: CommandExtensions.Parse, OK: CommandExtensions.Parse, OK: OptionExtensions.Parse, OK: OptionExtensions.Parse, OK: Parser.Parse, OK: ParserExtensions.Parse, OK: CommandExtensions.Invoke, OK: CommandExtensions.Invoke, OK: ParseResultExtensions.Invoke, OK: ParserExtensions.Invoke, OK: ParserExtensions.Invoke, OK: CommandExtensions.InvokeAsync, OK: CommandExtensions.InvokeAsync, OK: ParseResultExtensions.InvokeAsync, OK: ParserExtensions.InvokeAsync, OK: ParserExtensions.InvokeAsync, OK: RootCommand.ctor(String))

arguments.name: path
arguments.description: Input archives path. Can be a file or a folder or a list of files/folders.

commands.name: unbundle
commands.description: Target an archive to extract files from.

arguments.name: path
arguments.description: Input paths to .archive files or folders.

commands.name: uncook
commands.description: Target an archive to uncook files from.

arguments.name: path
arguments.description: Input paths to .archive files or folders.

commands.name: import
commands.description: Import raw files into redengine files.

arguments.name: path
arguments.description: Input path for raw files. Can be a file or a folder or a list of files/folders.

commands.name: export
commands.description: Export a file or list of files into raw files.

arguments.name: path
arguments.description: Input path to file/directory or list of files/directories.

commands.name: pack
commands.description: Pack resource files into an .archive file.

commands.name: build
commands.description: Builds all WolvenKit .cpmodproj project(s) found in <paths>.

commands.name: convert
commands.description: Convert CR2W (extracted) resource files and convert to json.

commands.name: deserialize
commands.description: Create a CR2W file from json.

arguments.name: path
arguments.description: Input path to CR2W files or folders.

commands.name: serialize
commands.description: Serialize the CR2W file to json.

arguments.name: path
arguments.description: Input path to a CR2W file or folder.

commands.name: conflicts
commands.description: Lists all mod conflicts in your mods.

arguments.name: path
arguments.description: Path to your Cyberpunk 2077 game folder (if left empty it will use the current working directory). [default: <path>]

commands.name: hash
commands.description: Some helper functions related to hashes.

arguments.name: input
arguments.description: Create FNV1A hash for given strings.

commands.name: oodle
commands.description: Some helper functions related to Oodle.

commands.name: wwise
commands.description: Some helper functions related to Wwise.

arguments.name: path
arguments.description: Input path to a CR2W file or folder.
